prompt: Generate a report on the most actively publishing reinforcement learning researchers in the past 2 years, including their affiliation, h-index trend, and recent conference appearances.

Find people who have both a strong academic publication record in NLP and also hold senior engineering positions at tech companies. I want the rare academics-turned-practitioners.
